english.line: 3 lb. butternut squash, peeled, seeded and cubed
10 slices day old bread, quartered and crusts removed
3 good size onions, cut up fine
2 green apples, cored and cut into thin wedges
english.preparation: cored and cut into thin wedges

english.line: 3 large ripe bananas, cut in chunks
6 boneless chicken breasts, cut into thin strips
2 1/2 c. cornflake crumbs, crushed but not pulverized
1 small red, yellow, or green bell pepper, seeded and cubed
1/2 c. apples, peeled, cored and diced
1 1/2 c. plus 2 Tbsp. Bisquick baking mix, divided
1 small yellow squash, halved lengthwise and sliced
1 small red or green bell pepper, chopped
1 large leek, washed and chopped or sliced
1 bunch fresh broccoli, chopped in small pieces
1 medium size yellow onion, peeled and chopped
5 c. unsweetened peaches, peeled, diced and drained (can use fresh or frozen)
1 ripe tomato, chopped into small pieces
1/2 gal. pineapple or lemon sherbet, softened
1/2 lb. (2 sticks) unsalted butter, at room temperature
1 (10 oz.) can fat-free cream of chicken soup
1 (2 lb.) bag frozen hash brown potatoes
1 (16 oz.) bottle picante or salsa sauce
1 (1 lb. 14 oz.) can pumpkin pie mix
1 (6 oz.) can crushed pineapple and juice
1 (11 oz.) can mandarin oranges with juice (reserve 3 slices to place on top of cake)
english.preparation: with juice (reserve 3 slices to place on top of cake)

english.line: 1 (0.4 oz.) pkg. buttermilk salad dressing mix
1 can Campbell's Healthy Request cream of mushroom soup
1 pkg. chocolate fudge or chocolate cake mix (without pudding)
english.ingredient: chocolate fudge or chocolate cake mix

english.line: 1 (8 oz.) bottle Kraft House Italian dressing
4 medium potatoes, peeled and cut in chunks
1 (17 oz.) can sliced peaches, drained (may substitute apricots)
1 can of diced tomatoes with green chilies and peppers
1 (10 oz.) can diced tomatoes with chilies, undrained
1 stick margarine, melted but not hot
4 medium fresh tomatoes, peeled and chopped
1 (9 oz.) can crushed pineapple, not drained
2 whole boneless, skinless chicken breasts, sliced thin
6 shallots or 1 small onion, finely chopped
2 medium Granny Smith apples, peeled and cored

swedish.line: 1 dl hackade soltorkade tomater i olja (avrunna)
ca 4 1/2 dl vetemjöl (4,5 dl motsvarar ca 270 g)
färska blåbär, jordgubbar, hallon eller kiwi
300 g färska bär (t ex jordgubbar och blåbär)
finrivet skal och juice av 1/2 tvättad citron
1 förp kokta stora vita bönor (à 380 g)
1 liter färdigkokt risgrynsgröt (1 liter gröt motsvarar ca 1 kg)
